title: Stella's Hypixel Skyblock Mods
description: The modpack Stella uses on various versions of Hypixel Skyblock
body:
Stella's Personal Skyblock mods for newer versions of Minecraft 

= Just a modpack meant to make Hypixel Skyblock easier, with various QOL improvements that are allowed for Hypixel Skyblock use

- All mods on the Hypixel network are use at your own risk, as stated in the Hypixel [Rules](https://support.hypixel.net/hc/en-us/articles/6472550754962-Hypixel-Allowed-Modifications)

- All of these mods are hosted on Modrinth, and downloaded from Modrinth to try to help your own safety. I have not added any mods from alternative places such as CurseForge or GitHub 

- I aim to have this Modpack ran on all sorts of machines, I can only verify it's playable on the machines I own though which are _pretty high end_, which is a 16GB (base model) M4 Macbook Pro and a linux Ryzen 9950x, AMD 7900XTX Gaming PC
